heading: Training and technical assistance
label: 4212 Training and technical assistance
text: There are authorized to be appropriated for assistance for a national organization representing Native American housing interests for providing training and technical assistance to Indian housing authorities and tribally designated housing entities such sums as may be necessary for each of fiscal years 2009 through 2013.
notes: Amendments2008— substituted “2009 through 2013” for “1997 through 2007”.Pub. L. 110–4112002— substituted “1997 through 2007” for “1997, 1998, 1999, 2000, and 2001”.Pub. L. 107–292
